sentences.english: My family had a picnic in the park last Sunday.
sentences.korean: 지난 일요일에 가족이 공원에서 소풍을 했어요.

sentences.english: Mom made sandwiches and fruit salad.
We sat on a blanket under a big tree.
sentences.korean: 큰 나무 아래 담요 위에 앉았어요.

sentences.english: After eating we played badminton and flew a kite.
sentences.korean: 먹고 나서 배드민턴을 치고 연을 날렸어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
